name: ATC-05: 异常登录数据驱动验证 — ATC-05-004

steps.name: 输入异常凭据: username=«standard_user», password=«wrong_password»

parameters.value: {'test_id': 'ATC-05-004', 'description': '错误密码登录', 'username': 'standard_user', 'password': 'wrong_password', 'expected_error': 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service'}
